About XLR8 Wellness

A landmark hub rooted in the North East

XLR8 Wellness is building Tyne & Wear's first integrated wellness and home healthcare destination — a multi-floor hub on the Tyne that unites accredited holistic therapists, registered healthcare practitioners, and digital health technology under one roof.

We believe that premium wellness should be accessible to everyone in the North East — not just those who can travel to London or abroad. Our hub and digital marketplace will connect the community with gold-standard care: at the centre, or delivered directly to your home.

XLR8 Wellness is part of Clubtogether Hospitality Ltd, which also operates xlr8well.com — our healthcare marketplace already live in Dubai, UAE.

What We Will Provide

Services at the hub & in your home

Every service available in-hub or delivered by our vetted practitioners directly to your door across Tyne & Wear.

🎵
Sound Healing & Frequency Therapy

IPHM-accredited 9D immersive sound sessions, tuning fork therapy, and vibroacoustic treatments for stress, anxiety, and chronic pain relief.

In-Hub & Home
🧩
Autism & Neurodiversity Support

IBCCES-certified consultations, family guidance, and tailored care pathways for autistic individuals and their families across the North East.

Consultations
💉
IV Therapy & Home Healthcare

Mobile IV infusions, nutrient therapy, vitamin drips, and clinical wellness treatments delivered by qualified practitioners to your home.

Home Delivery
✈️
Medical Travel & Retreats

GHA-certified medical travel consultancy, wellness retreat planning, and international healthcare coordination linking the UK with global excellence.

Global
🧘
Holistic Therapies Marketplace

A curated digital platform connecting you with accredited holistic therapists across the region — massage, reflexology, acupuncture, reiki, and more.

Digital Platform
🏥
Rehabilitation & Specialist Care

Physiotherapy, occupational therapy, and specialist wellness programmes within the hub's dedicated clinical spaces, staffed by accredited professionals.

In-Hub

Choose your appointment at our Newcastle hub or request a home visit — our practitioners come to you, fully equipped and vetted.
